title: Conduct GMP Inspections
description: Perform inspections of manufacturing facilities to ensure compliance with Good Manufacturing Practices.

title: Review Clinical Trial Applications
description: Evaluate clinical trial applications for safety and scientific merit before authorising human trials.

title: Monitor Adverse Drug Reactions
description: Collect, assess and report adverse drug reaction data from healthcare facilities and patients.

title: Develop Regulatory Guidelines
description: Draft, review and publish regulatory guidelines and standard operating procedures.

title: Perform Laboratory Testing
description: Conduct quality control laboratory testing of pharmaceutical products.

title: Assess Bioequivalence Studies
description: Review and evaluate bioequivalence study reports for generic medicine registration.

title: Signal Detection & Analysis
description: Identify and investigate safety signals from pharmacovigilance data sources.

title: Regulatory Dossier Review
description: Conduct comprehensive review of product registration dossiers.

title: Strategic Planning
description: Develop institutional strategic plans and performance monitoring frameworks.

title: Import/Export Control
description: Review and authorise import and export permits for regulated products.

title: Post-Market Surveillance
description: Monitor product quality and safety after market authorisation.

title: Stakeholder Engagement
description: Coordinate with international regulatory bodies and industry stakeholders.

title: Pharmacovigilance Database Maintenance
description: Manage and maintain national pharmacovigilance databases and reporting tools.

title: Risk Management Plan Review
description: Evaluate risk management plans submitted by marketing authorisation holders.

title: Inspection Report Writing
description: Document inspection findings into formal regulatory reports.

title: Generic Medicines Registration
description: Process and approve generic medicine registration applications.

title: Pharmaceutical Sample Analysis
description: Conduct laboratory analysis of pharmaceutical samples for quality assurance.

title: Regulatory Policy Development
description: Draft national regulatory policies and frameworks aligned with global standards.

title: Inspector Training Programs
description: Design and deliver training programs for new regulatory inspectors.

title: Adverse Event Causality Assessment
description: Perform causality assessment of reported adverse drug events.

title: Batch Record Review
description: Review batch manufacturing records and documentation for compliance.

title: Validation Protocol Assessment
description: Assess equipment and process validation protocols for regulated manufacturing.

title: Community Pharmacy Inspections
description: Conduct inspections of community pharmacies against licensing requirements.

title: Herbal Medicines Assessment
description: Assess applications for traditional and herbal medicinal products.
